head.hi: The Secretary of State to the Chiefs of Certain American Diplomatic Missions
head.note: In Belgium, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, and Switzerland.

div.p: As soon as you can conveniently assemble the opinion and reaction of important officials and individuals to the vote in the House of Representatives Friday night on the neutrality legislationH. J. Res. 306 (introduced May 19) as passed by the House of Representatives June 30, 1939, included the embargo clause as section 2; see Congressional Record, vol. 84, pt. 8, p. 8514. It was referred to the Senate Committee on Foreign Relations, July 5, 1939. I would like to have a report on the subject together with your own comment and appraisal of the effects of the vote on the policy of the government to which you are accredited and upon the European situation generally.
